title: selaginella rupincola
intro: Selaginella rupincola, also known as Rupincola spike moss, is a species of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Selaginella rupincola include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Selaginella rupincola include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
